enums.name: KubernetesConfigurationPrivateLinkScopePublicNetworkAccessType

values.name: Enabled
values.doc: Allows Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over both public (internet) and private endpoints.

values.name: Disabled
values.doc: Does not allow Azure Arc agents to communicate with Azure Arc services over public (internet) endpoints. The agents must use the private link.

enums.doc: The network access policy to determine if Azure Arc agents can use public Azure Arc service endpoints. Defaults to disabled (access to Azure Arc services only via private link).

enums.name: KubernetesConfigurationPrivateLinkScopeProvisioningState
enums.doc: The provisioning state of the resource.

values.name: Pending
values.doc: Connection waiting for approval or rejection
